title: Ginginsia teretifolia
intro: Ginginsia teretifolia, also known as Mexican Prickly Poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Ginginsia teretifolia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ginginsia teretifolia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and reduce stress.
